Package neqsim.process.safety.rupture

Class TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.rupture.TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy extends Object implements Serializable
Transient trapped-liquid fire rupture screening study for blocked-in piping segments.

The study combines an evidence-linked TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventoryResult, fire heat exposure, transient wall heating, thermal expansion pressure rise, temperature-reduced material strength, and optional flange/relief checks. It is a structured screening model intended to identify segments that need pressure relief, passive fire protection, operational safeguards, or detailed specialist analysis.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

    • TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy

  • Method Details

    • builder

      public static TrappedLiquidFireRuptureStudy.Builder builder()
      Creates a builder.
      Returns:
      new builder

    • run

      public TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult run()
      Runs the transient rupture screening calculation.
      Returns:
      rupture study result

    • recordEvents

      private void recordEvents(TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult.Builder result, double timeS, double pressurePa, double vonMisesStressPa, double allowableStressPa, double flangeRatingPa, double liquidTemperatureK)
      Records event times for the current transient state.
      Parameters:
      result - result builder
      timeS - current time in s
      pressurePa - current pressure in Pa
      vonMisesStressPa - current von Mises stress in Pa
      allowableStressPa - current allowable stress in Pa
      flangeRatingPa - current temperature-reduced flange rating in Pa
      liquidTemperatureK - current liquid temperature in K

    • addStandards

      private void addStandards(TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult.Builder result)
      Adds applied standard references to the result.
      Parameters:
      result - result builder

    • addInputWarnings

      private void addInputWarnings(TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult.Builder result, double liquidMassKg)
      Adds setup warnings to the result.
      Parameters:
      result - result builder
      liquidMassKg - effective liquid mass in kg

    • addRecommendations

      private void addRecommendations(TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult.Builder result)
      Adds engineering recommendations after the run.
      Parameters:
      result - result builder

    • pressureFromThermalExpansion

      private double pressureFromThermalExpansion(double initialPressurePa, double initialTemperatureK, double liquidTemperatureK)
      Calculates pressure rise from blocked-liquid thermal expansion.
      Parameters:
      initialPressurePa - initial pressure in Pa
      initialTemperatureK - initial temperature in K
      liquidTemperatureK - current liquid temperature in K
      Returns:
      pressure in Pa

    • vaporPhaseLikely

      private boolean vaporPhaseLikely(double pressurePa, double temperatureK)
      Checks whether a vapor phase appears at the current state.
      Parameters:
      pressurePa - pressure in Pa
      temperatureK - temperature in K
      Returns:
      true if a gas phase is detected in the NeqSim flash

    • flangeClassRatingPa

      private static double flangeClassRatingPa(int flangeClass)
      Gets ambient flange class rating in Pa.
      Parameters:
      flangeClass - ASME B16.5 pressure class, or zero when not configured
      Returns:
      ambient pressure rating in Pa, or positive infinity when no flange is configured

    • temperatureReducedFlangeRating

      private static double temperatureReducedFlangeRating(double ambientRatingPa, double metalTemperatureK)
      Applies a generic high-temperature derating to an ambient flange pressure class.
      Parameters:
      ambientRatingPa - ambient flange rating in Pa
      metalTemperatureK - metal temperature in K
      Returns:
      temperature-reduced rating in Pa

      private static double toMeters(double value, String unit)
      Converts a length value to meters.

      value - length value

      Returns:

      private static void validatePositive(double value, String name)
      Validates that a numeric value is positive and finite.
      Parameters:
      value - value to validate
      name - parameter name used in exception messages
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if value is invalid
